client_request: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: Development of a web-based online appointment booking system designed to empower customers with self-service appointment scheduling and automated reminders, while providing the administrative team with comprehensive tools for managing bookings, services, and operational availability. The system prioritizes user-friendliness and mobile accessibility, with future scalability for advanced reporting capabilities.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To significantly streamline the appointment scheduling process, enhance overall customer satisfaction through convenient online booking and timely communication, and improve operational efficiency for the administrative team by centralizing booking management.

objectives: Enable customers to effortlessly book and manage appointments online from any device.
Implement an automated notification system to provide customers with timely appointment reminders.
Provide the administrative team with a robust, intuitive interface for comprehensive management of appointments, services, and staff availability.
Ensure the system delivers a simple, intuitive, and mobile-responsive user experience for all stakeholders.
Establish a foundational architecture that supports future integration of advanced reporting and analytics functionalities.

stakeholders.description: Individuals who will use the system to book, view, and potentially cancel their appointments online.
Staff responsible for managing appointments, configuring services, defining availability, and overseeing the booking process.
The client responsible for the project, interested in operational efficiency, customer satisfaction, and future reporting for business insights.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Appointment Booking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to browse available services, view real-time slot availability based on service and staff, select a preferred date and time, and confirm their appointment.
acceptance_criteria: A customer can select a service from a displayed list.
A customer can view available time slots for the selected service and date.
A customer can select an available time slot and provide necessary contact information (e.g., name, email, phone number).
A customer can review and confirm their booking, receiving instant confirmation on-screen.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Appointment Reminders
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall automatically send reminders to customers for their upcoming appointments.
acceptance_criteria: A reminder email is sent to the customer 24 hours prior to their scheduled appointment.
The reminder email includes appointment details (service, date, time, location/notes).
The system provides an option for customers to cancel or reschedule their appointment directly from the reminder (if enabled by admin).

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Booking Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide an administrative interface for managing all aspects of appointments, including viewing, adding, modifying, and cancelling bookings.
acceptance_criteria: An admin user can view a comprehensive list of all appointments, with filtering and search capabilities by date, customer, and service.
An admin user can manually create a new appointment for a customer.
An admin user can modify details of an existing appointment (e.g., date, time, service, customer contact).
An admin user can cancel an existing appointment, triggering appropriate notifications to the customer.

functionalRequirements.title: Service and Availability Configuration
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow administrative users to configure available services, define staff working hours, and manage appointment slot durations.
acceptance_criteria: An admin user can add, edit, or delete services, including service name, description, duration, and price.
An admin user can define the working hours and availability for each staff member or resource.
The system accurately calculates and displays available booking slots based on configured services, staff availability, and existing bookings.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin User Authentication
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide a secure login mechanism for administrative users to access the management interface.
acceptance_criteria: An admin user can securely log in to the administrative interface using a username and password.
The system prevents unauthorized access attempts to the administrative interface.
The system provides a 'forgot password' recovery mechanism for admin users.

functionalRequirements.title: Data Foundation for Reporting
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall store booking and customer data in a structured and accessible format to facilitate future reporting and analytics.
acceptance_criteria: All booking data (customer, service, date, time, status) is stored persistently and is retrievable.
Customer contact information and service details are stored in a relational manner to bookings.
The data schema is designed to support queries for metrics like 'bookings per service' or 'bookings per day'.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Usability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall be intuitive and easy to navigate for both customers and administrative users, requiring minimal training.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Mobile Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system's user interface shall adapt seamlessly to various screen sizes and devices, including desktops, tablets, and smartphones, without loss of functionality or readability.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: All public-facing pages and administrative functions shall load within 3 seconds under normal usage conditions (up to 50 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall protect sensitive customer data and administrative credentials through encryption and secure authentication protocols, adhering to industry best practices.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system architecture shall be capable of accommodating a significant increase in the number of services, bookings, and users without requiring a complete redesign, supporting up to 1000 bookings per day.

assumptions: Customers have reliable internet access and a valid email address or phone number for reminders.
The client will provide comprehensive details regarding services, staff availability, and any specific business rules for booking.
The system will initially focus on a web-based application, not native mobile applications for iOS/Android.
The client will be responsible for defining content (text, images) for the public-facing booking interface.
The scope for 'reports later' implies data collection and storage capabilities, with detailed report generation being a potential future phase.
constraints: Project development must adhere to a defined budget and timeline (to be specified in project plan).
Compliance with relevant data privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) is mandatory for handling customer data.
The system must operate on a standard cloud hosting environment (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) to ensure availability and scalability.
Initial deployment will not involve integration with existing POS or CRM systems.
acceptanceCriteria: All identified CRITICAL and HIGH priority functional requirements are implemented and verified.
The system successfully passes user acceptance testing (UAT) by both customer representatives and administrative staff.
The system achieves a minimum score of 80% on a usability heuristic evaluation performed by an independent expert.
The system demonstrates full mobile responsiveness across common device types and browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
